symptom: agent can't find the 'Sign in with a password instead' link and defaults to email-OTP (which it can't read) on profile.theguardian.com
cause: the link is a plain <a> that camofox's a11y SNAPSHOT does not surface; a DOM query finds it instantly. Clicking 'Continue with email' first sends an OTP and the password option is then harder to reach
fix: do NOT rely on the snapshot. Navigate DIRECTLY to https://profile.theguardian.com/signin/password?signInEmail=<email> (email+password fields appear), OR on /signin native-click the link via a DOM query: [...document.querySelectorAll('a')].find(e=>/password instead/i.test(e.innerText)).click(). Fill email+password from the ats-credentials.csv 'jobs.theguardian.com (Madgex)' row and submit — password login BYPASSES the OTP entirely

symptom: after Guardian credential auth, the 'You are signed in — Continue' <a> button does nothing on a synthetic .click() (React), so login looks stuck
cause: the Continue is an <a> whose React handler ignores DOM .click() (same class as the apply-Send silent-click bug)
fix: read the Continue <a>'s href and cfx.goto it directly; login.py does this. Password login PASSES the reCAPTCHA on the camofox fingerprint — no noVNC needed

symptom: Guardian jobs split ~50/50 in-platform (on-page CV form) vs external (Apply on website -> employer ATS); the feed marks ALL guardian-direct (optimistic default, unreliable)
cause: the feed can't open each detail page; apply type is only knowable on the job page
fix: CLASSIFY at apply time: apply.py --classify (in-platform=drive, external=skip/account-wall). In-platform apply is fully driveable (atsform fill + CV upload on a plain file input + opt-out) EXCEPT the reCAPTCHA v2 on 'Send application' distrusts the camofox fingerprint (no token) -> one-time noVNC pass per submit; everything else is autonomous. login.py's password login DID pass its own reCAPTCHA
